title: Language Change - Houston Screen - Retry
scenario: Language update via Device Settings fails with "Houston" error when headset is powered off during firmware update, and Retry returns to previous screen
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Pair and connect the Poly headset to the Android device via Bluetooth.
3. From the Home screen, tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
5. Select a new language from the available list.
6. Tap 'Update Now' to trigger a firmware update for the headset.
7. During the update, within the first 20% of progress, turn off the headset by pressing and holding the Power button.
8. Observe the error screen displayed on the app.
expected: After tapping 'Retry', the user is returned to the previous screen (Language selection or Device Settings) to attempt the update again.
